programme.title: Disasters at Sea
programme.desc: The MS Norman Atlantic ferry is engulfed in fire while transporting passengers and vehicles from Greece to Italy during the holiday rush.

programme.desc: When a Colorado commuter flight ends in disaster, the shocking cause will rock the entire airline industry.
